μ₀.description: Hypothesized population mean under the null hypothesis, the specified mean fill of the cereal boxes (in ounces)

n.description: Sample size of cereal boxes drawn for the quality-control test

s.description: Sample standard deviation of the cereal box fill weights (in ounces)

μₐ.description: Actual population mean under the alternative hypothesis, representing the machine underfilling by an average of 0.1 ounce (in ounces)

α.description: Significance levels corresponding to the two rejection regions for which the Type II error probability β is calculated
